title: Code 33 Manufacturing Focus Area
description: The Naval Materials S&T Division supports basic and applied research and advanced development in the physical sciences and engineering, materials and processing, and environmental quality that enable enhanced performance, affordability, survivability, and reliability for future and legacy Navy and Marine Corps systems and platforms.
text:
The Manufacturing Focus Area develops technologies that acquisition programs need to make the design, fabrication, construction, repair and sustainment of naval platforms more affordable. This focus area also supports manufacturing S&T that accelerates the delivery of capabilities to the fleet and force. Advanced manufacturing technologies include additive manufacturing, repair and sustainment technologies, and coupling computational tools from design to sustainment.​
Manufacturing Focus Area Lead:
Dr. Jennifer Wolk
jennifer.n.wolk.civ@us.navy.mil
